reponses.text: This figure is theoretical, you will discuss face-to-face. This allowed you to concretize the managerial activities that you can set up.

categories.description: For each question, please tick one answer to know your result.
categories.title: In the list of managerial activities below, what is the frequency of implementation in your work?

questions.text: I organize and lead team meetings.
I explain the vision and strategic decisions.
I establish an individual action plan (training plan).
I assist a team member who is 'stuck'.
I update myself about the activity of my team.
I am involved in transversal projects.
I develop a network of internal / external relations.
I initiate the career plans of my team members.
I live the values of companies (exemplarity).
I transmit the information to my manager.
I coordinate with the other managers.
I carry out the administrative follow-up.
I participate in the identification of the necessary means.
I set up a personal development plan.
I determine the objectives of my team and evaluate them.
I encourage the team to propose ideas and I present them to others.
I am accessible for the team.
I ask for feedback (on myself, the way I manage).
I organize and lead team meetings.
